@@ -2058,0 +2058,9 @@
+JNI_ENTRY_CHECKED(jboolean,
+  checked_jni_IsValueObject(JNIEnv *env,
+                            jobject obj))
+    functionEnter(thr);
+    jboolean result = UNCHECKED()->IsValueObject(env, obj);
+    functionExit(thr);
+    return result;
+JNI_END
+

+    checked_jni_GetStringUTFLengthAsLong,
